style_effects: Flickering translucent violet aura pulses gently around Nidoking's form, casting elongated, shadowy tendrils that twist unnaturally in the air. Slow-drifting mist particles glow with faint bioluminescent purple light, swirling in lazy spirals as energy ripples visibly through its ethereal skin. The lighting mood is an eerie, cold blue-white luminescence that casts distorted reflections on nearby surfaces, with no warmth or sharp edges. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
